{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Shifting Skies limb
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The fragments of the weapon will be merged with the [[Shifting Skies limb]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
